problem id: ff8b36e7
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(1) XOR SHR(2)

examples:
  11101010 -> 11101111
  00110101 -> 01100111
  01000010 -> 10010100
  01110110 -> 11110001
  01011110 -> 10101011
  00111011 -> 01111000
  00101001 -> 01011000
  00011001 -> 00110100
  11010100 -> 10011100
  01100010 -> 11011100

query: 00101110
predicted answer: 01010111
